name: Apple
hint: A round fruit with a red or green skin and a crisp texture.

name: Banana
hint: A long, curved fruit with a yellow skin and a soft, sweet flesh.

name: Orange
hint: A citrus fruit with a bright orange skin and juicy segments.

name: Grapes
hint: Small, round fruit that grows in clusters and comes in various colors.

name: Strawberry
hint: A small, red fruit with seeds on the outside and a sweet taste.

name: Watermelon
hint: A large, juicy fruit with a green rind and red or pink flesh.

name: Pineapple
hint: A tropical fruit with a spiky, rough skin and a sweet, tangy taste.

name: Mango
hint: A juicy fruit with a golden-yellow skin and a sweet, tropical flavor.

name: Kiwi
hint: A small, brown fruit with a fuzzy skin and bright green flesh.

name: Blueberry
hint: Small, round berries with a dark blue color and a sweet-tart taste.
